case_title: GEMMA M LUDKEY VS. ARTURO BONILLA CASTRO

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO APR-26-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-23-2024 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-26-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-26-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA HUSING. PLAINTIFF GEMMA M. LUDKEY APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ARTURO BONILLA CASTRO. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE SYLVIA HUSING, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. MAY-03-2024. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEFENDANT. (ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-23-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APPEARED. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. JUDGE: DANIEL FLORES; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: 0 SERVED MAR-14-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, ARTURO BONILLA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUDKEY, GEMMA M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTRO, ARTURO BONILLA $9,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
